description: A finding raised by only one reviewer (minority-of-one) in the security category. Stage 6 exempts security findings from severity demotion per FR-MR14b security carve-out.

consolidated_findings.title: Password reset token is not invalidated after use
consolidated_findings.description: The resetPassword function does not mark the reset token as used after successful password change, allowing replay attacks within the token's validity window.

notes.minority_of_one_detected: raised_by has exactly 1 entry → minority-of-one rule applies
notes.security_exemption: category=security → security carve-out fires → demotion is SKIPPED
notes.severity_unchanged: high remains high; it is NOT demoted to medium
notes.rationale: Security findings may be unique to a single reviewer because other reviewers missed it, not because it is wrong. Demotion would suppress legitimate security findings.
